dimensions.name: LangGraph Architecture
dimensions.description: Evaluation of hierarchical state graphs, parallelism, and state management.
criteria: Use of StateGraph with typed AgentState.
Proper use of state reducers to manage parallel updates.

dimensions.name: Judicial Nuance
dimensions.description: The depth and logic of the dialectical process in the swarm.
criteria: Distinct personas (Prosecutor, Defense, Tech Lead) providing conflicting views.
Use of structured output to enforce judicial protocols.
Synthesis of conflicting arguments into a final decision.

dimensions.name: Forensic Tool Engineering
dimensions.description: The sophistication of code and document analysis tools.
criteria: AST parsing instead of brittle regex.
Automated Git history analysis for process evaluation.
